purpose: Inventory gate for country racing structure, official sources, racecourse scope, and seed validity before any country is treated as covered.

coverage_terms.not_started: The source or racing system is known but no timetable coverage work has started.
coverage_terms.initial_seed_only: A small source-reviewed seed exists, but it is not broad coverage and must not be presented as complete.
coverage_terms.partial: Some usable active-window records exist, but the country/racing system is not fully covered.
coverage_terms.out_of_window_seed: Records exist but are outside the active Today/Tomorrow/30-day window and must not be treated as useful current calendar coverage.
coverage_terms.broad: A substantial portion of the known official calendar is represented, but final completeness still requires review.
coverage_terms.complete: All known in-scope official racing systems, racecourses, calendar sources, and active-window meetings have been reviewed for the declared coverage window. No current country may use this without a separate completion pass.

global_rules: Do not call a country complete unless every active official racing system in this inventory has a source, racecourse scope, and coverage review.
Do not treat initial seed records as country coverage.
Do not treat records outside the active 30-day window as useful current calendar coverage.
Do not add racecards, entries, horse names, jockey names, odds, results, payouts, predictions, tips, raw HTML, or source response bodies.
Official source links remain the final confirmation point.

countries.current_seed_state: PR-056 added four JRA records for Tokyo and Kyoto on 2026-05-30 and 2026-05-31 only. This is not Japan coverage.

racing_systems.name: Japan Racing Association
racing_systems.coverage_notes: Only Tokyo and Kyoto have seed records. The other JRA racecourses remain unseeded. JRA coverage cannot be called broad or complete.

racing_systems.name: National Association of Racing / local government racing
racing_systems.role: Local government racing coordination; source split required before timetable coverage.

official_sources.label: NAR official site
official_sources.usage: source candidate; not yet wired into repository source records

racing_systems.coverage_notes: NAR racecourse inventory and source mapping are not yet implemented. Japan must show NAR as not started.

racing_systems.name: Banei / Obihiro
racing_systems.role: Draft-horse sled racing at Obihiro; must be tracked separately from JRA flat/jump and NAR flat racing.

official_sources.label: Banei Tokachi official site
official_sources.usage: source candidate; not yet wired into repository source records

racing_systems.coverage_notes: Banei is not covered by the current JRA seed and must be displayed as not started.

countries.current_seed_state: PR-055 added several HKJC June 2026 meeting-level records for Sha Tin and Happy Valley. This is not a completion review.

racing_systems.name: Hong Kong Jockey Club
racing_systems.role: Primary Hong Kong racing operator and official fixture source.
racing_systems.coverage_notes: Current seed is not a season or active-window completion pass. A review must verify the full target fixture window before broad/complete status.

countries.current_seed_state: PR-057 added April 2026 ERA meeting records, but generated_at is 2026-05-29, so they are outside the active 30-day calendar window.

racing_systems.name: Emirates Racing Authority / Emirates Racing
racing_systems.role: Official UAE racing calendar source candidate.
racing_systems.coverage_notes: Current UAE records are source-reviewed but outside the active Today/Tomorrow/30-day window. Additional racecourse review is required before any broad/complete claim.
